name: headache
title: best herbal teas for headache
description: Rosmarinus officinalis tea contains bioactive constituents such as carnosic acid, carnosol, and ursolic acid, which are known to possess potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help to alleviate headache symptoms. The tea also exhibits analgesic and anti-nociceptive properties, which can help to reduce pain and discomfort associated with headaches. To make this tea, simply steep 1 teaspoon of dried Rosmarinus officinalis leaves in 1 cup of boiling water for 5-7 minutes...
